summary: Verified the duplicate-sprite / cached-hash bug fix and reset teardown end-to-end via Playwright. All 7 required scenarios PASS: happy path, no-auto-confirm after Play Again, unique LTC seeds across turns, sessionStorage wiped on IDLE, fresh listener on re-insert (no ghost), XMR path unchanged with unique seeds, no JS/console exceptions.

verified_behavior.regression_happy_path_ltc: PASS — insert-ltc-button -> INVOICE -> simulate-payment-button -> PROCESSING -> VERIFIED -> capsule drops -> tap prize-capsule -> REVEALED with sprite-canvas/sprite-label/download-sprite-button.
verified_behavior.no_free_duplicate: PASS — after play-again-button + re-insert-ltc, app remains in INVOICE state for 3s wait; sprite-canvas and prize-capsule NOT visible; no auto VERIFIED/DISPENSING/DROPPED/REVEALED.
verified_behavior.sessionstorage_wipe: PASS — sessionStorage.getItem('gasha_session_v1') is null immediately after play-again-button on IDLE; PRESENT during active REVEALED state (as expected).
verified_behavior.abort_no_ghost: PASS — fresh live-log lines appear after re-insert ('Polling Blockchair', 'litecoinspace: no 0-conf incoming yet'); exactly 1 prize-capsule element per turn (no double dispense); no stale confirmation fires.
verified_behavior.xmr_path: PASS — insert-xmr-button shows shielded message in live-listener; no live-log DOM element rendered; simulate-payment-button drives full reveal; XMR turn1 seed 'aadccac86a98cdc8fb0ed93c...' != turn2 'dfa99ce24d477417dc308380...'.
verified_behavior.no_js_exceptions: PASS — 11 console entries total, 0 real JS/React exceptions (only expected Blockchair 430 / litecoinspace network warnings and AbortError from intentional controller.abort()).

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix implementation looks correct: consumedRef Set burns hashes on redemption and rejects them in both live-poller and verifyAndArm; abortRef.abort() called in resetAll AND on verify; sessionStorage.removeItem in resetAll + persist-effect when IDLE; buildSimulatedTx returns unique 64-hex hash each call (verified via distinct sprite-seed).

Minor: consumedRef persists only in memory (Set). On tab reload, if a hash restored from sessionStorage were valid it could theoretically re-arm — but since sessionStorage is now wiped on IDLE, the surface is limited to mid-session reloads which is acceptable per the traceless design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for duplicate-sprite/cached-hash fully verified via Playwright on public URL. Test flow: insert-ltc-button -> state-invoice -> simulate-payment-button -> wait for prize-capsule -> click prize-capsule (force=True, 600ms settle) -> state-revealed -> read sprite-seed. To trigger reset use play-again-button then check sessionStorage.getItem('gasha_session_v1') === null. Both LTC and XMR paths use the same simulate flow; only difference is XMR omits the live-log element and shows shielded copy in live-listener.
